name: The Voice V2
description: Step onto the biggest stage in Australia! You are face-to-face with the superstar coaches of The Voice: global pop sensation Rita Ora, Aussie soul queen Jessica Mauboy, chart-topping powerhouse Guy Sebastian, and country music legend Keith Urban. They are seated in their iconic red chairs, listening closely to every note, ready to hit their buttons and fight to bring you onto their team. This RPG lets you experience the thrill of the Blind Auditions, the Battles, and the journey to becoming a music star.
creator: 1zaki
